title: artemisia nitrosa var. nitrosa
intro: Artemisia nitrosa var. nitrosa, also known as sweet wormwood, is a perennial plant native to China and is a variety of the genus Artemisia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of malaria-carrying parasites and its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of sweet wormwood include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of malaria, and provide relief from digestive issues and menstrual cramps. Sweet wormwood can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional Chinese medicine and aromatherapy.
